heading: Standby Reserve: composition
label: 10151 Standby Reserve: composition
text: The Standby Reserve consists of those units or members, or both, of the reserve components, other than those in the Ready Reserve or Retired Reserve, who are liable for active duty only as provided in sections 12301 and 12306 of this title.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , prior to repeal by .section 273(a) of this titlePub. L. 103–337, § 1661(a)(2)(A)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .Dec. 1, 1994section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title
